general_advisory: According to MC, Bhubaneswar forecast, the district may receive dry weather/heat wave with very light rain at some places in the next 5 days. Provide necessary irrigation to crops and vegetables. For paddy cultivation, always use good quality seeds. Germination test is advisable before sowing. Apply well-decomposed FYM during final land preparation. Go for green manuring crops immediately after summer ploughing. For timely planting of vegetables, prepare the nursery bed immediately before monsoon rain for better utilization of rainwater. Provide clean and adequate water to the cattle. Allow them for grazing either in the morning or afternoon hours.

advisory: Instead of manual DSR followed by beushaning, farmers are advised to follow mechanized DSR cultivation with appropriate practices.
Farmers are advised to go for summer ploughing by utilizing the rain received in recent past days.
Arrange good quality seeds of @12kg/acre as green manuring crop.
Wrapping and propping should be done when the crop becomes 4-5 months old in medium and late duration varieties.
To control early shot borer in sugarcane, foliar spray of Fipronil 5SC @400 ml/acre is advised.
For timely planting of kharif vegetables like Brinjal & Chilli, prepare the nursery bed & treat the seed with (Carboxin+Thiram)@2g/kg of seed.

To control Fruit and shoot borer in Brinjal, Tomato & Okra, Spray Neem based pesticide 1500ppm @600ml/acre at initial stages. Later on go for alternate spray of Spinosad 45 SC @70ml/acre or Emamectin benzoate @80-100g/acre & Thiachloprid@250ml/l of water.
To control fruit fly attack in mango, use a fruit fly trap should be advised.
Papaya - Install Yellow Sticky trap to trap the vector (Whitefly) of Papaya Leaf Curl Virus.
To prepare a fish pond, apply lime @40-60 kg/acre based on PH & alkalinity value of water.
Maintain a water level of 5 ft. in the grow-out ponds.
If the animals have not yet been vaccinated against FMD, Haemorrhagic Septicaemia, Black Quarter, Enterotoxemia, etc., these must be done.
Provide clean and adequate water to the cattle. Allow them for grazing either in the morning or afternoon hour.
